complete_user_guide/system_management/me.系统可在每块板检测完成后，自动将检测结果导出到指定目录，供 MES / 上位系统: After each board is inspected, the system can automatically export the inspection results to a designated directory for an MES / host system to consume. The export includes a CSV report file, cropped images of defective components, and the stitched full-board image. This page describes how to use the default ``default_csv`` profile.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.说明如何启用 MES 导出、如何选择导出配置文件，以及默认配置下文件保存在哪里、: Explains how to enable MES export, how to choose an export profile, and—under the default profile—where files are stored and which fields the report contains, to help the site integrate with an MES or archive the results.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.右上角齿轮 → **设置** → **系统设置** → **系统配置** \\: Top-right gear → **Settings** → **System Settings** → **System Configuration** (visible to Admin / Programmer). The MES-related settings on this page fall into two parts:
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.**MES导出配置**：导出开关、路径、图像质量与保留天数。各选项含义详见 :r: **MES Export Config**: export toggles, path, image quality, and retention days. See :ref:`系统JSON配置` for the meaning of each option.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.**MES 配置文件**：选择当前生效的导出配置文件，并编辑其输出端配置。: **MES Profile**: choose the active export profile and edit its sink configuration.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.在 **导出MES路径** 填写导出根目录（请确保目录已存在且可写入）。: Fill in **Export MES Path** with the export root directory (make sure it already exists and is writable).
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.按需开启 **导出报告**、**导出元件图像**、**导出拼接图像** 三个开关: Turn on the **Export Report**, **Export Component Image**, and **Export Stitched Image** switches as needed (all off by default; turn them on before you need image export).
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.通过 **导出图像质量（1-100）** 调整 JPEG 清晰度，通过 **报告: Use **Export Image Quality (1–100)** to adjust JPEG sharpness, and **Report Retention (1–30 days)** to set how long local files are kept.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.在页面底部点击 **保存** 生效。: Click **Save** at the bottom of the page to apply.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.不同的\"配置文件\"对应不同的 MES 对接格式与输出方式。在 **MES 配: Different "profiles" correspond to different MES integration formats and output methods. In the **MES Profile** section:
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.**激活配置文件**：下拉选择当前生效的配置文件。出厂默认为 ``default: **Active profile**: a dropdown that selects the profile currently in effect. The factory default is ``default_csv`` — it exports a local CSV report and images, suitable for sites that do not connect directly to an MES.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.选择带连接信息的厂商配置文件时，下方会出现该配置文件的输出端配置项，带 ``*`: When a vendor profile that carries connection details is selected, that profile's sink configuration fields appear below; fields marked with ``*`` are required.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.部分定制配置文件需要单独启动外接进程，可在其外接进程控制区点击 **连接** /: Some customized profiles require a separate external process to be started; use **Connect** / **Disconnect** in that profile's external-process controls to manage its running state.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.配置文件的选择与编辑在点击页面底部的 **保存** 后才会生效。: Profile selection and edits take effect only after you click **Save** at the bottom of the page.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.修改导出配置文件或其字段后需重启后端服务才会完全生效。: Changing the export profile or its fields requires a backend restart to take full effect.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.启用导出后，所有文件保存在 **导出MES路径** 指定的根目录下，分为两个子目: Once export is enabled, all files are saved under the root directory set in **Export MES Path**, in two subdirectories:
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.``images/``：缺陷元件图与整板拼接图。: ``images/``: defective-component images and stitched full-board images.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.每次检测生成一个 CSV 文件，文件名由 大板SN、检测状态、机型、产线编号 与: Each inspection produces one CSV file. The file name is composed of the board SN, inspection status, model, lane number, and inspection record ID, so reports can be looked up per board. The report contains two parts.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.该板对应的 PCB 产品（程序）名称。: Name of the PCB product (program) this board corresponds to.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.整板条码 / 序列号。: Barcode / serial number of the whole board.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.本次实际检测的有效小板数量。: Number of valid sub-boards actually inspected this run.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.整板最终判定结果（合格 / 不合格）。: Final verdict for the whole board (pass / fail).
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.缺陷 / 错误类型；显示为经\"错误类型翻译\"映射后的 MES 厂商代码（若已: Defect / error type; shown as the MES vendor code after mapping through "Error Type Translation" (if configured).
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.该缺陷元件裁剪图在导出目录中的路径。: Path to the cropped image of the defective component within the export directory.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.缺陷所在小板在拼版中的序号。: Index of the sub-board (within the panel) where the defect is located.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.缺陷所在小板的条码 / 序列号。: Barcode / serial number of the sub-board where the defect is located.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.该缺陷复核后的状态（合格 / 不合格）。: Status of the defect after review (pass / fail).
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.开启 **导出元件图像** / **导出拼接图像** 后，图片按 机型 / 日期: Once **Export Component Image** / **Export Stitched Image** is enabled, images are stored in subdirectories by model / date / board SN / inspection record ID (each inspection gets its own directory, so re-measuring the same barcode does not overwrite earlier results):
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.缺陷元件图：按 位置号、小板号、小板序号 命名的 JPG 文件，与报告\"图片位: Defective-component images: JPG files named by designator, sub-board number, and sub-board index, matching the report's "Image location" column one-to-one.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.**导出报告**、**导出元件图像**、**导出拼接图像** 默认均为关闭；需要: **Export Report**, **Export Component Image**, and **Export Stitched Image** are all off by default; turn on the corresponding switch before you need image export.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.报告与图片仅在勾选导出且检测时实时生成；事后在复核页重新导出只会刷新报告，不会重: Reports and images are generated in real time only when export is enabled and during inspection; re-exporting later from the review page only refreshes the report and does not regenerate images.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.超过 **报告保存期限** 的本地报告与图片会被系统定期清理；通过 HTTP /: Local reports and images older than **Report Retention** are periodically cleaned up by the system; profiles that connect directly to an MES over HTTP / a vendor interface do not write local files and are unaffected by this cleanup.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.默认配置依据 大板SN 命名文件；若未扫描到整板条码，该次导出会失败并记录日志。: The default profile names files by board SN; if the board barcode was not scanned, that export fails and is logged.
complete_user_guide/system_management/me.缺陷的 **异常原因** 显示的是 MES 厂商代码，其映射在 :ref:`错误: A defect's **Defect reason** shows the MES vendor code; its mapping is maintained in :ref:`错误类型翻译`.

complete_user_guide/system_management/in.导出配置文件的选择、默认 ``default_csv`` 配置的存图路径与报告字: For choosing an export profile and the image storage paths and report fields of the default ``default_csv`` profile, see :ref:`MES 结果导出`.
